message:
feat(console): Add PoolStatusDisplay dashboard renderable

Implements connection pool status visualization:
- PoolHealth enum with Healthy/Busy/Degraded/Exhausted states
- PoolStatsProvider trait for flexible stats abstraction
- PoolStatusDisplay with render_plain() and render_styled() methods
- 23 tests covering health logic, rendering, and edge cases

Also fixes clippy warnings and formats code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
